description: Fill enclosed background regions inside the green shape with yellow. The boundary green pixels are preserved, and only interior holes become 4.
arcDslCode:
from dsl import *
from constants import *


def solve_00d62c1b(I):
    x1 = objects(I, T, F, F)
    x2 = colorfilter(x1, ZERO)
    x3 = rbind(bordering, I)
    x4 = compose(flip, x3)
    x5 = mfilter(x2, x4)
    O = fill(I, FOUR, x5)
    return O
